     the Fermi energy is     0.2419 ev

!    total energy              =   -6197.39653546 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000003 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.04978223 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -6197.34675323 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -123991.43243587 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   62571.16893296 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2131.48624394 Ry
